rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.122, which criminalizes possession of intoxicants on public school grounds. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.122. POSSESSION OF INTOXICANTS ON PUBLIC SCHOOL GROUNDS.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
